qa_pairs.question: How can one view the content of an SSH public key file on Windows, Linux, or macOS?
qa_pairs.answer: On Windows, you can examine the SSH public key by opening the file with Notepad. For Linux or macOS, you should enter `cat .ssh/id_rsa.pub` on the command line.

qa_pairs.question: What is the typical appearance or format of an SSH public key when viewed as plain text?
qa_pairs.answer: When viewed as plain text, an SSH public key is displayed as a very long single line, commonly starting with `ssh-rsa` followed by an extensive string of characters.
